name: Postman
description: API development platform for building, testing, documenting, and managing APIs used by 30M+ developers worldwide
pros: Industry standard API testing tool used by 98% of Fortune 500
Generous free tier for individual developers
Collections, environments, and team workspaces for collaboration
Founded by Indian developers (Abhinav Asthana, Bengaluru)
cons: Delaware incorporated, HQ moved to San Francisco in 2017
US VC firms (Insight Partners, Coatue) hold majority stake
Free tier limitations pushing toward paid plans
Desktop app can be resource-heavy compared to alternatives like Hoppscotch
userComplaints: App gets slow with large collections and many environments
Forced to sign in even for local-only usage since v10
Free plan team size limits feel restrictive
